offlineBanner: You are offline. Unsynced attendance and cached pages may be all you have until the network returns.
installTitle: Don't lose a school day to bad connectivity
installDescription: Install ShuleOS on this device—one tap now beats re-entering attendance when the network drops.
installAppDescription: Add ShuleOS to your home screen before the next time the connection fails.
offlineDescription: {productName} needs a connection for most features. Cached pages may still open, and attendance you saved offline will sync when you reconnect.
pushPromptTitle: Missed periods cost the whole class
pushPromptDescription: Turn on alerts so the next period hits your lock screen like an alarm—before students are waiting and you're still in the hallway.
